jabatan.description: Job role or title of the employee

photoUrl.description: Base64 encoded string or URL of the employee's profile photo

AttendancePair.title: AttendancePair
AttendancePair.description: Detailed attendance pair record for a specific day and employee

id.description: Unique key matching employee ID and date

masuk.description: Clock-in detail map containing timestamp, photo, location and optional notes

pulang.description: Clock-out detail map containing timestamp, photo, location and optional notes

workDurationMinutes.description: Calculated total duration of work in minutes

notes.description: General or specific attendance override notes

employees/{employeeId}.description: Storage collection for all active employee records

attendance/{attendanceId}.description: Storage collection for daily check-in/out and general attendance logs
